scripts.setup-hooks: git config core.hooksPath .githooks && chmod +x .githooks/pre-push && echo 'Git hooks configured'
scripts.bump-sw: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const v='honeyos-'+new Date().toISOString().replace(/[^0-9]/g,'').slice(0,14);fs.writeFileSync('sw.js',fs.readFileSync('sw.js','utf8').replace(/const CACHE = '[^']*'/,\"const CACHE = '\"+v+\"'\"));console.log('SW version:',v);"
